network.offline: [UNTRANSLATED] You are offline. Some features may be unavailable.
network.timeout: [UNTRANSLATED] Request timed out. Please check your connection and try again.
network.server_unreachable: [UNTRANSLATED] Server is unreachable. This may be a first-load cold start — please wait a moment.

server.internal: [UNTRANSLATED] Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
server.service_unavailable: [UNTRANSLATED] Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
server.bad_gateway: [UNTRANSLATED] Upstream service failed. Please try again.
server.maintenance: [UNTRANSLATED] System is under maintenance. Please check back shortly.

auth.unauthorized: [UNTRANSLATED] You need to sign in to access this feature.
auth.forbidden: [UNTRANSLATED] You do not have permission to perform this action.
auth.session_expired: [UNTRANSLATED] Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.invalid_credentials: [UNTRANSLATED] Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.token_expired: [UNTRANSLATED] Authentication token expired. Please refresh the page.
auth.csrf_mismatch: [UNTRANSLATED] Security token mismatch. Please refresh and try again.

not_found.resource: [UNTRANSLATED] The requested resource was not found.
not_found.page: [UNTRANSLATED] This page could not be found.
not_found.location: [UNTRANSLATED] Location not found. Please try a different search.

validation.invalid_email: [UNTRANSLATED] Please enter a valid email address.
validation.invalid_phone: [UNTRANSLATED] Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.invalid_format: [UNTRANSLATED] Invalid format. Please check your input.
validation.phone_india: [UNTRANSLATED] Please enter a valid 10-digit Indian phone number.

location.permission_denied: [UNTRANSLATED] Location permission was denied. Enable GPS in your browser settings.
location.unavailable: [UNTRANSLATED] GPS location is unavailable. Please try again.
location.timeout: [UNTRANSLATED] GPS lookup timed out. Please ensure you are outdoors.
location.unsupported: [UNTRANSLATED] Geolocation is not supported on this device.

sos.no_services: [UNTRANSLATED] No emergency services found nearby. Call 112.
sos.already_active: [UNTRANSLATED] An SOS is already active for your session.
sos.queue_offline: [UNTRANSLATED] SOS queued offline. It will be sent when you reconnect.

chatbot.llm_unavailable: [UNTRANSLATED] AI assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
chatbot.stream_interrupted: [UNTRANSLATED] Response stream was interrupted. Please retry.
chatbot.no_response: [UNTRANSLATED] No response from the AI. Please rephrase your question.
chatbot.rate_limited: [UNTRANSLATED] Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
chatbot.context_too_long: [UNTRANSLATED] Conversation is too long. Please start a new chat.

upload.file_too_large: [UNTRANSLATED] File exceeds the maximum upload size.
upload.virus_scan: [UNTRANSLATED] File failed security scan. Please upload a different file.

challan.calculation_failed: [UNTRANSLATED] Fine calculation failed. Please try again.
challan.offline_fallback: [UNTRANSLATED] Using offline fine data — results may not reflect recent changes.

tracking.connection_failed: [UNTRANSLATED] Failed to connect to tracking service.
tracking.no_updates: [UNTRANSLATED] No location updates received. Check GPS settings.

report.submit_failed: [UNTRANSLATED] Failed to submit report. Please try again.
report.photo_required: [UNTRANSLATED] A photo is required for road issue reports.
report.location_required: [UNTRANSLATED] GPS location is required to submit a report.
